name: Mixed Disagreements with Temporality
description: Scenario demonstrating mixed disagreement types with temporal elements: client 0 has permanent inbound exclusion with client 1, client 2 has temporary outbound exclusion with client 3 (rounds 1-2), client 4 has permanent bidirectional exclusion with client 0, and client 1 opts for temporary full exclusion (rounds 1-3).

expected_tracks.track_3_no2: For client 3, excluding client 2 (due to client 2's outbound disagreement)

expected_tracks_round_3.global: Global track (clients 2 and 3 join after outbound exclusion expires)

expected_tracks_round_4.global: Global track (clients 1, 2, 3 after full exclusion expires)

expected_tracks_round_5.global: Global track (clients 1, 2, 3 after full exclusion expires)

round_1_rules.description: Client 1 should be fully excluded from all tracks

round_4_rules.description: Client 0's track should still exclude client 1
Clients 1, 2, 3, 6, 7, 8, 9 should be on global track after temporal disagreements expire
